name: Cluster-based Gene Enrichment Analysis Service
description: Run functional enrichment analysis on clustered spatial transcriptomics data. Performs enrichment analysis for each cluster separately by extracting cluster-specific genes (highly expressed or marker genes) and identifying enriched pathways/functions. Uses gseapy Enrichr, supports many gene set libraries (GO, KEGG, etc.) and organisms. Results include cluster information for each enrichment result. Computes rich stats (total/ significant pathways, p-value/FDR distributions, per-pathway gene counts, odds ratio, combined score, overlap counts) and produces multiple plots (top pathways bar, enrichment dot, gene ratio, p-value histogram, volcano) with cluster annotations.

cluster_key.description: Column name in obs containing cluster labels (e.g., 'cluster', 'leiden', 'louvain')

gene_selection_method.description: Method to select genes for each cluster: 'top_expressed' (top N highly expressed genes) or 'marker_genes' (cluster-specific marker genes using fold change)

top_n_genes.description: Number of top genes to select per cluster (used when gene_selection_method='top_expressed')

library.description: Enrichment library name (common Enrichr libraries; must be one of the listed values)

engine.description: Enrichment engine: enrichr or kegg (kegg auto-selects KEGG_2021_* or the provided KEGG_* name)

file.description: Clustered spatial transcriptomics data in AnnData/h5ad format. Must contain cluster labels in obs (specified by cluster_key parameter) and gene expression matrix.

output_config.collection_description: Outputs enrichment result CSVs, detailed stats, and multiple visualizations.

items.description: CSV file containing functional enrichment analysis results from gseapy Enrichr, with one row per cluster-pathway combination. Columns: 'cluster' (cluster ID), 'Term' (pathway/term name), 'Overlap' (overlap between input genes and term genes, e.g., '50/200'), 'P-value' (statistical p-value for enrichment), 'Adjusted P-value' (adjusted p-value using multiple testing correction), 'Odds Ratio' (odds ratio for enrichment), 'Combined Score' (combined score combining p-value and odds ratio), 'Genes' (comma-separated list of overlapping genes), 'gene_count' (number of overlapping genes), 'total_genes' (total genes in the term)
Top pathways bar plot (PNG, 300 DPI) showing -log10 p-values for the top 20 enriched items per cluster, with cluster annotations
Enrichment volcano plot (PNG, 300 DPI) showing -log10 adjusted p-value vs odds ratio for pathways

Detailed text report containing comprehensive enrichment analysis statistics including analysis parameters, basic statistics, p-value distributions, combined score distributions, overlap gene counts, gene count per pathway statistics, odds ratio distributions, and per-cluster statistics with top enriched terms
